title: spec-kitty next --json (issue or blocked envelope)
description: Locks behavior for FR-006 / FR-011. When `spec-kitty next --json` issues a step, every issued step MUST carry a non-empty, on-disk-resolvable `prompt_file`. When no prompt is resolvable, the call MUST return a structured blocked decision instead of issuing a partial step.

prompt_file.description: Project-relative or absolute path to the prompt the agent should execute. MUST be non-empty and MUST resolve to an existing file on disk.

context.description: Optional additional context for the step.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why no step can be issued.
